name: CEC 2013 Single Objective Real-Parameter Optimization
description: CEC 2013 benchmark suite (F1-F28) with BBOB-style transforms (oscillation, asymmetric, conditioning, double rotation).

functions.note: KNOWN ISSUE: Float64 precision amplification at D10/D30. The asymmetric transform raises rotated values to ~8th power, amplifying ULP differences between BLAS and C loop matrix multiplication to macroscopic errors. Unfixable — inherent to float64 non-associativity.

KNOWN ISSUE (C reference bug): Global y[]/z[] buffer aliasing in asyfunc retains stale values for negative elements. Combined with hardcoded schwefel internals, this makes exact C reproduction impossible without monolithic reimplementation.
KNOWN ISSUE (C reference bug): Global y[]/z[] buffer aliasing in asyfunc — see F21 note.
